ioa_definitions.name: Federation Tampering - Golden SAML Risk
ioa_definitions.description: Detects modification of federation settings that could enable token forging

ioa_definitions.name: Serverless Backdoor Detection
ioa_definitions.description: Detects Lambda/Function creation or modification from non-IaC sources
